chapters.summary: Covers vectors, equations of motion, projectile motion on horizontal and inclined planes, relative velocity in 1D and 2D (rain-man and river-boat problems), and circular motion basics.

keyConcepts.title: Projectile on Inclined Plane
keyConcepts.description: Motion analysed by resolving gravity along (g sin theta) and perpendicular (g cos theta) to the incline surface.

keyConcepts.title: Relative Velocity in 2D
keyConcepts.description: Used to find shortest path/time in river crossings: V_boat_ground = V_boat_river + V_river_ground.

formulas.name: Time of Flight (Horizontal Projectile)
formulas.description: u is initial speed, theta is angle of projection with horizontal.

formulas.name: Equation of Trajectory
formulas.equation: y = x * tan(theta) - (g * x^2) / (2 * u^2 * cos^2(theta))

practiceResources.title: JEE Main & Advanced Kinematics Practice Sheet PDF

quizzes.question: A projectile is thrown with velocity v at an angle theta. If range R is equal to maximum height H, then tan(theta) is:
quizzes.explanation: R = (u^2 * sin 2theta)/g and H = (u^2 * sin^2 theta)/(2g). Since R = H, (u^2 * 2 sin theta cos theta)/g = (u^2 * sin^2 theta)/(2g) => 2 cos theta = (sin theta)/2 => tan theta = 4.

quizzes.question: A boat crosses a river of width D in the shortest possible time. If velocity of boat in still water is v and river velocity is u, the time taken is:
quizzes.explanation: To cross the river in shortest time, the boat should steer perpendicular to the river flow (theta = 90 deg relative to flow). The velocity component perpendicular to river banks is v. Time = D / v.

chapters.summary: Deals with the behavior of functions as they approach specific points. Topics include standard limits, indeterminate forms (0/0, inf/inf, 1^inf), L'Hopital's rule, sandwich theorem, and testing continuity at a point.

keyConcepts.title: Indeterminate Form 1^infinity
keyConcepts.description: If lim f(x) = 1 and lim g(x) = infinity, then lim [f(x)]^g(x) = e^[lim (f(x) - 1)*g(x)].

keyConcepts.title: L'Hopital's Rule
keyConcepts.description: For indeterminate forms 0/0 or inf/inf, lim f(x)/g(x) = lim f'(x)/g'(x) provided limits exist.

videos.title: Limits for JEE Main & Advanced - Complete Series

quizzes.question: Find the value of lim (x->0) [tan(x) - sin(x)] / x^3.
quizzes.explanation: Write as lim [sin(x)(1 - cos(x))] / (x^3 * cos(x)) = lim (sin(x)/x) * [(1-cos(x))/x^2] * (1/cos(x)). As x->0, sin(x)/x -> 1, (1-cos(x))/x^2 -> 1/2, and 1/cos(x) -> 1. Result is 1 * (1/2) * 1 = 1/2.
